narrative:
Licking Township A (precinct in Licking County) has 1,697 registered voters, with 51.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.8 percentage points.
